---
title: "Figures for RISE Posters"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Read in Fall 2024 L2 Data

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)

```

```{r}

SRER_2024 <- read.csv("/Users/AlexiBesser/Desktop/SRER_LPI_L2_Fall_2024_Data.csv")
SRER_2024$Site <- "SRER"
SRER_2024$Season <- "F24"
colnames(SRER_2024)[colnames(SRER_2024) == "Litter_depth"] <- "Litter_depth_center"
ONAQ_2024 <- read.csv("/Users/AlexiBesser/Desktop/ONAQ_LPI_L2_Fall_2024_Data.csv")
ONAQ_2024$Site <- "ONAQ"
ONAQ_2024$Season <- "F24"
ONAQ_2024$Remarks[ONAQ_2024$Remarks == "44_sameJUOS_45-42"] <- "44"
ONAQ_2024$Remarks <- as.numeric(ONAQ_2024$Remarks)

JORN_2024 <- read.csv("/Users/AlexiBesser/Desktop/JORN_LPI_L2_Fall_2024_Data.csv")
JORN_2024$Site <- "JORN"
JORN_2024$Season <- "F24"
MOAB_2024 <- read.csv("/Users/AlexiBesser/Desktop/MOAB_LPI_L2_Fall_2024_Data.csv")
MOAB_2024$Site <- "MOAB"
MOAB_2024$Season <- "F24"

SRER_2025 <- read.csv("/Users/AlexiBesser/Desktop/SRER_LPI_L2_Spring_2025_Data.csv")
SRER_2025$Site <- "SRER"
SRER_2025$Season <- "S25"
ONAQ_2025 <- read.csv("/Users/AlexiBesser/Desktop/ONAQ_LPI_L2_Spring_2025_Data.csv")
ONAQ_2025$Site <- "ONAQ"
ONAQ_2025$Season <- "S25"
JORN_2025 <- read.csv("/Users/AlexiBesser/Desktop/JORN_LPI_L2_Spring_2025_Data.csv")
JORN_2025$Site <- "JORN"
JORN_2025$Season <- "S25"
MOAB_2025 <- read.csv("/Users/AlexiBesser/Desktop/MOAB_LPI_L2_Spring_2025_Data.csv")
MOAB_2025$Site <- "MOAB"
MOAB_2025$Season <- "S25"

 
prelim_all_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(SRER_2024, SRER_2025, JORN_2024, JORN_2025, ONAQ_2024, ONAQ_2025, MOAB_2024, MOAB_2025)

prelim_all_data <- prelim_all_data %>%
  select(!c("X.1", "X"))

write.csv(prelim_all_data, "~/Desktop/Prelim_DeAD_LPI_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
library(dplyr)

prelim_all_data <- read.csv("~/Desktop/Prelim_DeAD_LPI_data.csv")

prelim_all_data <- prelim_all_data %>%
  mutate(Transect = if_else(Site == "SRER" & Season == "S25",
                            paste0(Transect, "S25"),
                            Transect))

# SRER_2025_L1 <- read.csv("/Users/AlexiBesser/Desktop/SRER_LPI_L1_Spring_2025_Data.csv")

quad_data <- rbind(SRER_2025, ONAQ_2025, MOAB_2025, JORN_2025)

```

```{r}

SRER_2024_mic <- SRER_2024 %>%
  select(Transect, Remarks, Elevation, Top_layer, Top_layer_other, Litter, Litter_other, Litter_depth_center, Top_height, Soil_surface, Soil_surface_other, Microsite, Microsite_other)

SRER_2024_mic$Season <- "Fall 2024"

JORN_2024_mic <- JORN_2024 %>%
  select(Transect, Remarks, Elevation, Top_layer, Top_layer_other, Litter, Litter_other, Litter_depth_center, Top_height, Soil_surface, Soil_surface_other, Microsite, Microsite_other)

JORN_2024_mic$Season <- "Fall 2024"

MOAB_2024_mic <- MOAB_2024 %>%
  select(Transect, Remarks, Elevation, Top_layer, Top_layer_other, Litter, Litter_other, Litter_depth_center, Top_height, Soil_surface, Soil_surface_other, Microsite, Microsite_other)

MOAB_2024_mic$Season <- "Fall 2024"

ONAQ_2024_mic <- ONAQ_2024 %>%
  select(Transect, Remarks, Elevation, Top_layer, Top_layer_other, Litter, Litter_other, Litter_depth_center, Top_height, Soil_surface, Soil_surface_other, Microsite, Microsite_other)

ONAQ_2024_mic$Season <- "Fall 2024"

SRER_2025_mic <- SRER_2025 %>%
  select(Transect, Remarks, Elevation, Top_layer, Top_layer_other, Litter, Litter_other, Litter_depth_center, Top_height, Soil_surface, Soil_surface_other, Microsite, Microsite_other)

SRER_2025_mic$Transect <- paste0(SRER_2025_mic$Transect, "S25")

SRER_2025_mic$Season <- "Spring 2025"

JORN_2025_mic <- JORN_2025 %>%
  select(Transect, Remarks, Elevation, Top_layer, Top_layer_other, Litter, Litter_other, Litter_depth_center, Top_height, Soil_surface, Soil_surface_other, Microsite, Microsite_other)

JORN_2025_mic$Season <- "Spring 2025"

MOAB_2025_mic <- MOAB_2025 %>%
  select(Transect, Remarks, Elevation, Top_layer, Top_layer_other, Litter, Litter_other, Litter_depth_center, Top_height, Soil_surface, Soil_surface_other, Microsite, Microsite_other)

MOAB_2025_mic$Season <- "Spring 2025"

ONAQ_2025_mic <- ONAQ_2025 %>%
  select(Transect, Remarks, Elevation, Top_layer, Top_layer_other, Litter, Litter_other, Litter_depth_center, Top_height, Soil_surface, Soil_surface_other, Microsite, Microsite_other)

ONAQ_2025_mic$Season <- "Spring 2025"

all_mic <- rbind(SRER_2024_mic, SRER_2025_mic, JORN_2024_mic, JORN_2025_mic, MOAB_2024_mic, MOAB_2025_mic, ONAQ_2024_mic, ONAQ_2025_mic)

```

```{r}

all_mic <- prelim_all_data

# caclulate elevation ranges for each site for Table 1 of Besser et al.
ElevationStats <- all_mic %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(min_elev = min(Elevation),
                   max_elev = max(Elevation))

# Make a new column
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting <- all_mic$Microsite

# if Top_layer is "L-PGRASS" or "D-PGRASS"
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "L-PGRASS") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Perennial Grass Canopy"}
}
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "D-PGRASS") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Perennial Grass Canopy"}
}

# if Top_layer is "L-SHRUB" or "D-SHRUB"
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "L-SHRUB") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "D-SHRUB") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

# if Top_layer is "NONE"
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "NONE") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Bare Ground"}
}
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "N") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Bare Ground"}
}

# if Top_layer is "D-FORB" or "D-AGRASS"
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "D-FORB") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Annual Grasses and Forbs"}
}
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "D-AGRASS") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Annual Grasses and Forbs"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "L-FORB") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Annual Grasses and Forbs"}
}
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "L-AGRASS") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Annual Grasses and Forbs"}
}

# cactus
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "L-CACT") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Cactus Canopy"}
}
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "D-CACT") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Cactus Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "OP") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Cactus Canopy"}
}
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "CY") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Cactus Canopy"}
}

# ACAN
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "ACAN") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

# ACHY
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "ACHY") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Perennial Grass Canopy"}
}

# AGCR
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "AGCR") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Perennial Grass Canopy"}
}

# ARTR
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "ARTR") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

# ATCA
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "ATCA") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

# ATCO
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "ATCO") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

# BOER
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "BOER") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Perennial Grass Canopy"}
}

# BOGR
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "BOGR") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Perennial Grass Canopy"}
}

# BRTE
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "BRTE") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Annual Grasses and Forbs"}
}

# BRTR
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "BRTR") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Annual Grasses and Forbs"}
}

# CAER
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "CAER") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Subshrubs"}
}

# CEPA
for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "CEPA") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "EP") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "EPIP") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Cactus Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "EPTO") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "EPVI") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "ERLE") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Perennial Grass Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "ERNA") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "FEWI") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Cactus Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "FOSP") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "GUSA") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Subshrubs"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "HAGL") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Annual Grasses and Forbs"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "HIJA") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Perennial Grass Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "ISTE") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Subshrubs"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "JUOS") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "KRLA") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Subshrubs"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "LATR") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "PAFL") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "PI") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "PRGL") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "PRVE") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "PSSP") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Perennial Grass Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "PUST") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "PUTR") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "SAMI") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "SATR") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Subshrubs"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "SAVE") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "SEGR") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "SHRUB") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "SOEL") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Subshrubs"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "SP") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Subshrubs"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "UNK") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "UNK1") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "UNKNOWN") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (!is.na(all_mic$Top_layer_other[i]) && all_mic$Top_layer_other[i] == "YUEL") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Shrub Canopy"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "L-SUBS") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Subshrubs"}
}

for (i in 1:nrow(all_mic)) {
  if (all_mic$Top_layer[i] == "D-SUBS") {
    all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[i] <- "Open: Subshrubs"}
}

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="SRER001" & all_mic$Remarks == "8", "Microsite_Plotting"] <- "Shrub Canopy"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="SRER025" & all_mic$Remarks == "40", "Microsite_Plotting"] <- "Shrub Canopy"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="MOAB107" & all_mic$Remarks == "48", "Microsite_Plotting"] <- "Shrub Canopy"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="JORN141" & all_mic$Remarks == "25", "Microsite_Plotting"] <- "Shrub Canopy"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="ONAQ049" & all_mic$Remarks == "9", "Microsite_Plotting"] <- "Shrub Canopy"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="MOAB006" & all_mic$Remarks == "13", "Microsite_Plotting"] <- "Open: Subshrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="MOAB010" & all_mic$Remarks == "22", "Microsite_Plotting"] <- "Open: Subshrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="ONAQ012" & all_mic$Remarks == "7", "Microsite_Plotting"] <- "Open: Subshrubs"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Shrub Canopy"] <- "Canopy: Shrubs"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Perennial Grass Canopy"] <- "Canopy: Perennial Grasses"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Cactus Canopy"] <- "Canopy: Cactus"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite == "ROCK"] <- "Downed Wood or Rocks"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "ROCK_CANOPY"] <- "Downed Wood or Rocks"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "CANOPY_ROCK"] <- "Downed Wood or Rocks"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite == "WOOD"] <- "Downed Wood or Rocks"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "WOOD_CANOPY"] <- "Downed Wood or Rocks"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "CANOPY_WOOD"] <- "Downed Wood or Rocks"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite == "WASH"] <- "Wash or Rill"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "WASH_CANOPY"] <- "Wash or Rill"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "CANOPY_WASH"] <- "Wash or Rill"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "ROCK_WASH"] <- "Wash or Rill"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite == "RILL"] <- "Wash or Rill"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "CANOPY_RILL"] <- "Wash or Rill"

# rename
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "HOLE"] <- "Animal Structures"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "AHILL"] <- "Animal Structures"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "BURROW"] <- "Animal Structures"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "GAMETRAIL"] <- "Animal Structures"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_other == "COWPRINT"] <- "Animal Structures"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Soil_surface_other == "TCAST"] <- "Animal Structures"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Soil_surface_other == "AHILL"] <- "Animal Structures"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Soil_surface_other == "ANTHILL"] <- "Animal Structures"

all_mic$Litter[all_mic$Litter == "N"] <- "NONE"

all_mic$Litter_depth_center <- as.numeric(all_mic$Litter_depth_center)
all_mic$Litter_depth_center[is.na(all_mic$Litter_depth_center)] <- 0


all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Wash or Rill"] <- "Washes or Rills"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Open: Annual Grasses and Forbs"] <- "Annual Grasses and Forbs"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Open: Subshrubs"] <- "Subshrubs"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Open: Bare Ground"] <- "Bare Ground"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Canopy: Cactus"] <- "Cactus"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Canopy: Perennial Grasses"] <- "Perennial Grasses"
all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Canopy: Shrubs"] <- "Shrubs"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Washes or Rills"] <- "Nonliving Retention Elements"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Animal Structures"] <- "Nonliving Retention Elements"

all_mic$Microsite_Plotting[all_mic$Microsite_Plotting == "Downed Wood or Rocks"] <- "Nonliving Retention Elements"

# first, calculate the mean, median, and total litter depths and the number of observations across litter types and microsites
MicrositeStats <- all_mic %>%
  group_by(Microsite_Plotting) %>%
  dplyr::reframe(
    mean_depth = mean(unlist(across(c(Litter_depth_center,
                                      Litter_depth_north,
                                      Litter_depth_east,
                                      Litter_depth_south,
                                      Litter_depth_west))), na.rm = TRUE),
    stdev_depth = sd(unlist(across(c(Litter_depth_center,
                                     Litter_depth_north,
                                     Litter_depth_east,
                                     Litter_depth_south,
                                     Litter_depth_west))), na.rm = TRUE),
    obs = n(),
    litter_obs_perc = (100 - mean(Litter == "NONE", na.rm = TRUE) * 100)) %>%
  mutate(mic_obs_perc = (obs / sum(obs)) * 100)

max_mic_obs_perc <- max(MicrositeStats$mic_obs_perc)
max_mean_depth <- max(MicrositeStats$mean_depth)
max_litter_obs_perc <- max(MicrositeStats$litter_obs_perc)

MicrositeStats$Microsite_Plotting <- factor(MicrositeStats$Microsite_Plotting,
                                            levels = c("Bare Ground",
                                                       "Nonliving Retention Elements",
                                                       "Annual Grasses and Forbs",
                                                       "Subshrubs", "Cactus",
                                                       "Perennial Grasses", "Shrubs"))

MeanDepthMicPercPlot <- ggplot(MicrositeStats, aes(x = Microsite_Plotting, y = mean_depth)) +
  labs(x = "Microsite", y = "Mean Litter Depth (mm)") +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack",
           fill = "#70B368", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mic_obs_perc * (max_mean_depth/max_mic_obs_perc)),
             size = 3, pch = 21, fill = "navy", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Mean Litter Depth (mm)",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . * (max_mic_obs_perc/max_mean_depth), 
                        name = "Observations of Microsite (%)"),
    limits = c(0, 8.5),
    expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
    legend.position = c(.8,.7),
    axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 14, angle = 90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75))

MeanDepthMicPercPlot

ggsave("~/Desktop/AllSites_MicrositeObservations_MeanLitterDepth.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 10, height = 6)


LitterMicPercPlot <- ggplot(MicrositeStats, aes(x = Microsite_Plotting, y = litter_obs_perc)) +
  labs(x = "Microsite", y = "Points with Litter (%)") +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack",
           fill = "gray50", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mic_obs_perc),
             size = 3, pch = 21, fill = "navy", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Observations (%)",
    limits = c(0, 100),
    expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("All Sites") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle = 45,hjust = 1)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
    legend.position = c(.8,.7),
    axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14, angle = 90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75))

LitterMicPercPlot


MicrositeSiteStats <- all_mic %>%
  group_by(Microsite_Plotting, Site) %>%
  dplyr::reframe(
    mean_depth = mean(unlist(across(c(Litter_depth_center,
                                      Litter_depth_north,
                                      Litter_depth_east,
                                      Litter_depth_south,
                                      Litter_depth_west))), na.rm = TRUE),
    stdev_depth = sd(unlist(across(c(Litter_depth_center,
                                     Litter_depth_north,
                                     Litter_depth_east,
                                     Litter_depth_south,
                                     Litter_depth_west))), na.rm = TRUE),
    obs = n(),
    litter_obs_perc = (100 - mean(Litter == "NONE", na.rm = TRUE) * 100)) %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
    mutate(mic_obs_perc = (obs / sum(obs)) * 100)

MicrositeSiteStats$Microsite_Plotting <- factor(MicrositeSiteStats$Microsite_Plotting,
                                            levels = c("Bare Ground",
                                                       "Nonliving Retention Elements",
                                                       "Annual Grasses and Forbs",
                                                       "Subshrubs", "Cactus",
                                                       "Perennial Grasses", "Shrubs"))

MicrositeSiteStats$Site <- factor(MicrositeSiteStats$Site, levels = c("JORN", "SRER", "MOAB", "ONAQ"))

LitterObsSitesPlot <- ggplot(MicrositeSiteStats, aes(x = Microsite_Plotting,
                                                     y = litter_obs_perc, fill = Site)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = Site), stat = "identity", position = "stack",
           color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("darkgoldenrod", "olivedrab", "sienna2", "darkseagreen3")) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mic_obs_perc), size = 3, pch = 21, fill = "navy", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ Site) +
  labs(x = "Microsite", y = "Points (%)") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 16, angle = 90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 105),
                     expand = c(0, 0))

LitterObsSitesPlot

ggsave("~/Desktop/AllSites_MicrositeObservations_LitterOccurrence.pdf", plot = LitterObsSitesPlot, width = 10, height = 6)

```

```{r}

# SRER 
SRERStats <- all_mic %>%
  filter(startsWith(Transect, "SRER")) %>%
  group_by(Microsite_Plotting) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    mean_depth = mean(Litter_depth_center, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs = n(),
    litter_obs_perc = mean(Litter_depth_center > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(mic_obs_perc = (obs / sum(obs)) * 100)

SRER_max_observations <- max(SRERStats$mic_obs_perc)
SRER_max_mean_depth <- max(SRERStats$mean_depth)
SRER_max_litter_obs_perc <- max(SRERStats$litter_obs_perc)

SRERStats$Microsite_Plotting <- factor(SRERStats$Microsite_Plotting,
                                         levels = c("Bare Ground", "Nonliving Retention Elements", "Cactus", "Annual Grasses and Forbs", "Perennial Grasses", "Subshrubs", "Shrubs"))

SRERplot <- ggplot(SRERStats, aes(x = Microsite_Plotting, y = litter_obs_perc)) +
  labs(x = "Microsite", y = "Observations (%)") +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", fill = "olivedrab", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mic_obs_perc), size = 3, pch = 21, fill = "navy", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    name = "Observations (%)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,100)) +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("SRER") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(color="black", face="bold", size=18),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color="black", size=14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color="black", size=14),
    legend.title = element_text(color="black", size=12),
    legend.text = element_text(color="black", size=10),
    legend.position = c(.8,.7),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color="black", size=18, angle=90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75))

SRERplot

ggsave("~/Desktop/SRER_MicrositeObservations_LitterOccurrence.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 10, height = 6)

```

```{r}

# JORN 
JORNStats <- all_mic %>%
  filter(startsWith(Transect, "JORN")) %>%
  group_by(Microsite_Plotting) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    mean_depth = mean(Litter_depth_center, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs = n(),
    mic_obs_perc = mean(n) * 100,
    litter_obs_perc = mean(Litter_depth_center > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(mic_obs_perc = (obs / sum(obs)) * 100)

JORN_max_observations <- max(JORNStats$mic_obs_perc)
JORN_max_mean_depth <- max(JORNStats$mean_depth)
JORN_max_litter_obs_perc <- max(JORNStats$litter_obs_perc)

JORN_cactus_row <- data.frame(Microsite_Plotting = "Cactus", mean_depth = 0, obs = 0, litter_obs_perc = 0, mic_obs_perc = 0)
JORNStats <- rbind(JORNStats, JORN_cactus_row)

JORNStats$Microsite_Plotting <- factor(JORNStats$Microsite_Plotting,
                                        levels = c("Bare Ground", "Nonliving Retention Elements", "Cactus", "Annual Grasses and Forbs", "Perennial Grasses", "Subshrubs", "Shrubs"))

JORNplot <- ggplot(JORNStats, aes(x = Microsite_Plotting, y = litter_obs_perc)) +
  labs(x = "Microsite", y = "Observations of Litter (%)") +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", fill = "darkgoldenrod", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mic_obs_perc), size = 3, pch = 21, fill = "navy", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    name = "Observations (%)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,100)) +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("JORN") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(color="black", face="bold", size=18),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color="black", size=14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color="black", size=14),
    legend.title = element_text(color="black", size=12),
    legend.text = element_text(color="black", size=10),
    legend.position = c(.8,.7),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color="black", size=18, angle=90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75))

# MOAB 
MOABStats <- all_mic %>%
  filter(startsWith(Transect, "MOAB")) %>%
  group_by(Microsite_Plotting) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    mean_depth = mean(Litter_depth_center, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs = n(),
    litter_obs_perc = mean(Litter_depth_center > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(mic_obs_perc = (obs / sum(obs)) * 100)

MOAB_max_observations <- max(MOABStats$mic_obs_perc)
MOAB_max_mean_depth <- max(MOABStats$mean_depth)
MOAB_max_litter_obs_perc <- max(MOABStats$litter_obs_perc)

MOABStats$Microsite_Plotting <- factor(MOABStats$Microsite_Plotting,
                                         levels = c("Bare Ground", "Nonliving Retention Elements", "Cactus", "Annual Grasses and Forbs", "Perennial Grasses", "Subshrubs", "Shrubs"))

MOABplot <- ggplot(MOABStats, aes(x = Microsite_Plotting, y = litter_obs_perc)) +
  labs(x = "Microsite", y = "Observations of Litter (%)") +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", fill = "sienna2", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mic_obs_perc), size = 3, pch = 21, fill = "navy", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    name = "Observations (%)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,100)) +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("MOAB") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(color="black", face="bold", size=18),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color="black", size=14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color="black", size=14),
    legend.title = element_text(color="black", size=12),
    legend.text = element_text(color="black", size=10),
    legend.position = c(.8,.7),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color="black", size=18, angle=90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75))


# ONAQ 
ONAQStats <- all_mic %>%
  filter(startsWith(Transect, "ONAQ")) %>%
  group_by(Microsite_Plotting) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    mean_depth = mean(Litter_depth_center, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs = n(),
    litter_obs_perc = mean(Litter_depth_center > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(mic_obs_perc = (obs / sum(obs)) * 100)

ONAQ_max_observations <- max(ONAQStats$mic_obs_perc)
ONAQ_max_mean_depth <- max(ONAQStats$mean_depth)
ONAQ_max_litter_obs_perc <- max(ONAQStats$litter_obs_perc)

ONAQStats$Microsite_Plotting <- factor(ONAQStats$Microsite_Plotting,
                                         levels = c("Bare Ground", "Nonliving Retention Elements", "Cactus", "Annual Grasses and Forbs", "Perennial Grasses", "Subshrubs", "Shrubs"))

ONAQplot <- ggplot(ONAQStats, aes(x = Microsite_Plotting, y = litter_obs_perc)) +
  labs(x = "Microsite", y = "Observations of Litter (%)") +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", fill = "darkseagreen3", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mic_obs_perc), size = 3, pch = 21, fill = "navy", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    name = "Observations (%)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,100)) +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("ONAQ") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(color="black", face="bold", size=18),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color="black", size=14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color="black", size=14),
    legend.title = element_text(color="black", size=12),
    legend.text = element_text(color="black", size=10),
    legend.position = c(.8,.7),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color="black", size=18, angle=90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75))


all_sites_array <- ggpubr::ggarrange(JORNplot, SRERplot, MOABplot, ONAQplot, ncol = 2, nrow = 2)

all_sites_array
ggsave("~/Desktop/MicrositeObservations_LitterOccurrence_perSite.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 20, height = 12)

```

```{r Top_layer_plot}

# create a new column and paste the value from the Top_layer column in it
all_mic$Top_Plotting <- all_mic$Top_layer

all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "L-SHRUB"] <- "Shrubs"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "D-SHRUB"] <- "Shrubs"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "L-SUBS"] <- "Subshrubs"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "D-SUBS"] <- "Subshrubs"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "L-FORB"] <- "Annual Grasses and Forbs"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "D-FORB"] <- "Annual Grasses and Forbs"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "L-AGRASS"] <- "Annual Grasses and Forbs"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "D-AGRASS"] <- "Annual Grasses and Forbs"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "L-PGRASS"] <- "Perennial Grasses"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "D-PGRASS"] <- "Perennial Grasses"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "L-CACT"] <- "Cactus"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "D-CACT"] <- "Cactus"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "N"] <- "Bare Ground"
all_mic$Top_Plotting[all_mic$Top_Plotting == "NONE"] <- "Bare Ground"

# if Top_layer is "L-OTHER" or "D-OTHER" - categorize Top_Plotting by the taxon listed in Top_layer_other
all_mic <- all_mic %>%
  mutate(Top_Plotting = ifelse(
      !is.na(Top_layer_other) &
      Top_layer_other %in% c("GUSA", "CAER", "ISTE", "KRLA", "SATR", "SOEL", "SP") &
      Top_layer %in% c("L-OTHER", "D-OTHER"),
      "Subshrubs",
      Top_Plotting))

all_mic <- all_mic %>%
  mutate(Top_Plotting = ifelse(
      !is.na(Top_layer_other) &
      Top_layer_other %in% c("ACAN", "ARTR", "ATCA", "ATCO", "CEPA", "EP", "EPTO", "EPVI",
                             "ERNA", "FOSP", "JUOS", "LATR", "PAFL", "PI", "PRGL", "PRVE",
                             "PUST", "PUTR", "SAMI", "SAVE", "SEGR", "SHRUB", "UNK",
                             "UNK1", "UNKNOWN", "YUEL") &
      Top_layer %in% c("L-OTHER", "D-OTHER"),
      "Shrubs",
      Top_Plotting))
      
all_mic <- all_mic %>%
  mutate(Top_Plotting = ifelse(
      !is.na(Top_layer_other) &
      Top_layer_other %in% c("BRTE", "BRTR", "HAGL") & 
      Top_layer %in% c("L-OTHER", "D-OTHER"),
      "Annual Grasses and Forbs",
      Top_Plotting))
      
all_mic <- all_mic %>%
  mutate(Top_Plotting = ifelse(
      !is.na(Top_layer_other) &
      Top_layer_other %in% c("ACHY", "AGCR", "BOER", "BOGR", "ERLE", "HIJA", "PSSP") &
      Top_layer %in% c("L-OTHER", "D-OTHER"),
      "Perennial Grasses",
      Top_Plotting))
      
all_mic <- all_mic %>%
  mutate(Top_Plotting = ifelse(
      !is.na(Top_layer_other) &
      Top_layer_other %in% c("CY", "FEWI", "OP") &
      Top_layer %in% c("L-OTHER", "D-OTHER"),
      "Cactus",
      Top_Plotting))

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="SRER001" & all_mic$Remarks == "8", "Top_Plotting"] <- "Shrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="SRER025" & all_mic$Remarks == "40", "Top_Plotting"] <- "Shrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="MOAB107" & all_mic$Remarks == "48", "Top_Plotting"] <- "Shrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="JORN141" & all_mic$Remarks == "25", "Top_Plotting"] <- "Shrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="ONAQ049" & all_mic$Remarks == "9", "Top_Plotting"] <- "Shrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="MOAB006" & all_mic$Remarks == "13", "Top_Plotting"] <- "Subshrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="MOAB010" & all_mic$Remarks == "22", "Top_Plotting"] <- "Subshrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="ONAQ012" & all_mic$Remarks == "7", "Top_Plotting"] <- "Subshrubs"

all_mic[all_mic$Transect=="SRER031" & all_mic$Remarks == "6", "Top_Plotting"] <- "Cactus"

# add a column for site
all_mic <- all_mic %>%
  mutate(Site = substr(Transect, 1, 4))
 
# calculate mean elevation per site
MeanElev <- all_mic %>%
  group_by(Transect) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(Mean.Elevation = mean(Elevation))

MeanElev <- MeanElev[order(MeanElev$Mean.Elevation), ]

MeanElev$Mean.Elevation <- factor(MeanElev$Mean.Elevation, levels = unique(MeanElev$Mean.Elevation))

elevation.order <- as.list(MeanElev$Transect)

# first, get counts, proportions, and percentages of each top layer type per transect
TopLayerStats <- all_mic %>%
  group_by(Top_Plotting, Transect, Site) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Transect) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(proportion = count / sum(count)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent = proportion*100)

TopLayerStatsSite <- all_mic %>%
  group_by(Top_Plotting, Site) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(proportion = count / sum(count)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent = proportion*100)

TopLayerStats$Transect <- factor(TopLayerStats$Transect, levels = elevation.order)




TopLayerStats$Site <- factor(TopLayerStats$Site, levels = c("JORN", "SRER", "MOAB", "ONAQ"))

# make a bar plot
TopLayerPlot <- ggplot(TopLayerStats,
                          aes(x = Transect, y = percent, fill = Top_Plotting)) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_x") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Transect (Low to High Elevation)", y = "Top Layer Frequency (%)",
       fill = "Top Layer") +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("hotpink", "darkgoldenrod1", 
                               "olivedrab3","deepskyblue", "darkgreen",
                               "#000000")) +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1)) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size=18),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color="black", size=14),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(color="black", size=16),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(color="black", size=18),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color="black", size=20, angle=90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

TopLayerPlot

ggsave("~/Desktop/AllSites_Top_Layer_Plots.pdf", TopLayerPlot, width = 14, height = 10)

MicrositeTransectStats <- all_mic %>%
  group_by(Site, Transect, Microsite_Plotting) %>%
  summarize(obs = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(mic_obs_perc = (obs / sum(obs)) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

MicrositeTransectStats$Microsite_Plotting <- factor(MicrositeTransectStats$Microsite_Plotting,
                                         levels = c("Cactus", "Annual Grasses and Forbs", "Perennial Grasses", "Subshrubs", "Shrubs", "Nonliving Retention Elements", "Bare Ground"))


MeanElev <- all_mic %>%
  group_by(Transect) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(Mean.Elevation = mean(Elevation))

MeanElev <- MeanElev[order(MeanElev$Mean.Elevation), ]

MeanElev$Mean.Elevation <- factor(MeanElev$Mean.Elevation, levels = unique(MeanElev$Mean.Elevation))

elevation.order <- as.list(MeanElev$Transect)

MicrositeTransectStats$Transect <- factor(MicrositeTransectStats$Transect, levels = elevation.order)

# make a bar plot
MicrositePlot <- ggplot(MicrositeTransectStats,
                          aes(x = Transect, y = mic_obs_perc, fill = Microsite_Plotting)) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_x") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  labs(x = "Transect (Low to High Elevation)", y = "Microsite Frequency (%)",
       fill = "Microsite") +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("hotpink", "darkgoldenrod1", 
                               "olivedrab3","deepskyblue", "darkgreen","grey50",
                               "#000000")) +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 20, angle = 90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))

MicrositePlot

ggsave("~/Desktop/AllSites_Microsite_Plots.pdf", MicrositePlot, width = 14, height = 10)

```

```{r}

all_mic_trimmed <- all_mic %>%
  filter(!Litter %in% c("DUNG", "LT-C", "LT-W"))

all_mic_trimmed <- all_mic_trimmed %>%
  filter(!Litter_other %in% c("DUNG", "W_DUNG", "W_B_DUNG", "B", "W", "W_B",
                              "W_C", "W_YUEL", "YUEL", "SEED"))

mean_depths <- all_mic_trimmed %>%
  mutate(mean_depth = rowMeans(across(c(
    Litter_depth_center,
    Litter_depth_north,
    Litter_depth_east,
    Litter_depth_south,
    Litter_depth_west
  )), na.rm = TRUE))
    
mean_depths$Microsite_Plotting <- factor(mean_depths$Microsite_Plotting,
                                             levels = c("Bare Ground", "Nonliving Retention Elements", "Cactus", "Annual Grasses and Forbs", "Perennial Grasses", "Subshrubs", "Shrubs"))

mean_depths$Site <- factor(mean_depths$Site,
                                             levels = c("JORN", "SRER", "MOAB", "ONAQ"))

LitterBoxPlot <- ggplot(mean_depths, aes(x = Microsite_Plotting, y = mean_depth, fill = Site)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title.position = "top")) +
  labs(x = element_blank(), y = "Litter Depth (mm)", fill = "Site") +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, preserve = "single"),
           color = "black",
           linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("darkgoldenrod","olivedrab", "sienna2", "darkseagreen3")) +
  ggprism::theme_prism(base_fontface = "plain", base_line_size = 0.75) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14, face = "bold", angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 20, angle = 90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_discrete(guide = ggprism::guide_prism_bracket())

LitterBoxPlot

ggsave("~/Desktop/Litter_Microsite_Boxplots.pdf", LitterBoxPlot, width = 14, height = 8)

LitterBoxPlotNoOutliers <- ggplot(mean_depths, aes(x = Microsite_Plotting, y = mean_depth, fill = Site)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title.position = "top")) +
  labs(x = element_blank(), y = "Litter Depth (mm)", fill = "Site") +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, preserve = "single"),
           color = "black",
           linewidth = 0.25, outliers = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("darkgoldenrod", "olivedrab", "sienna2", "darkseagreen3")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  ggprism::theme_prism(base_fontface = "plain", base_line_size = 0.75) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14, face = "bold", angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    legend.position = c(0.1, 0.9),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 20, angle = 90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_discrete(guide = ggprism::guide_prism_bracket())

LitterBoxPlotNoOutliers

ggsave("~/Desktop/Litter_Microsite_Boxplots_NoOutliers.pdf", LitterBoxPlotNoOutliers, width = 14, height = 8)

outliers <- ggplot_build(LitterBoxPlot)$data[[1]]$outliers
total_outliers <- sum(sapply(outliers, length))
outliers_per_microsite <- sapply(outliers, length)
names(outliers_per_microsite) <- levels(factor(all_mic_trimmed$cyl))
print(outliers_per_microsite)

LitterBoxPlotData <- ggplot_build(LitterBoxPlot)
outliers <- LitterBoxPlotData$data[[1]]$outliers

group_names <- levels(factor(interaction(all_mic_trimmed$Microsite_Plotting, all_mic_trimmed$Site)))

    # Calculate the number of outliers per group
    num_outliers_per_group <- sapply(outliers, length)

    # Combine with group names for a clear result
    outlier_counts_df <- data.frame(Group = group_names, OutlierCount = num_outliers_per_group)

    print(outlier_counts_df)
    
    # Build the ggplot object
LitterBoxPlotData <- ggplot_build(LitterBoxPlot)

# Extract the list of outliers
outliers_list <- LitterBoxPlotData$data[[1]]$outliers

# Get the group names (make sure this matches your plot grouping)
group_names <- levels(factor(interaction(mean_depths$Microsite_Plotting, mean_depths$Site, mean_depths$Transect, mean_depths$Remarks)))

# Combine the outlier values with group names
outliers_df <- data.frame(
  Group = rep(group_names, times = sapply(outliers_list, length)),
  OutlierValue = unlist(outliers_list)
)

print(outliers_df)


```

```{r}

ElevationStats <- mean_depths %>%
  group_by(Transect) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(meandepth = mean(mean_depth),
                 n = n(),
                 elev = mean(Elevation),
                 Site = first(Site),
                 Season = first(Season),
                 .groups = "drop")

elev_lm <- lm(mean_depth ~ Elevation, data = mean_depths)
summary(elev_lm)

ElevationStats$Group <- factor(
  interaction(ElevationStats$Site, ElevationStats$Season),
  levels = c("JORN.F24", "JORN.S25",
             "SRER.F24", "SRER.S25",
             "MOAB.F24", "MOAB.S25",
             "ONAQ.F24", "ONAQ.S25")
)


elev_depth <- ggplot(ElevationStats, aes(x = elev, y = meandepth,
                                         fill = Group)) +
  stat_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, fullrange = FALSE, aes(color = Group)) +
  geom_point(pch = 21, size = 5, color = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 22)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("darkgoldenrod4", "darkgoldenrod", "#4D6619", "olivedrab", "sienna4", "sienna2", "darkseagreen4", "darkseagreen3"),
                    name = NULL, 
                    breaks = c("JORN.F24", "JORN.S25", "SRER.F24",
                               "SRER.S25", "MOAB.F24", "MOAB.S25",
                               "ONAQ.F24", "ONAQ.S25"),
                    labels = c("JORN: Fall 2024", "JORN: Spring 2025", "SRER: Fall 2024",
                               "SRER: Spring 2025", "MOAB: Fall 2024", "MOAB: Spring 2025",
                               "ONAQ: Fall 2024", "ONAQ: Spring 2025")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("darkgoldenrod4", "darkgoldenrod", "#4D6619", "olivedrab", "sienna4", "sienna1", "darkseagreen4", "darkseagreen3"),
                    name = NULL, 
                   breaks = c("JORN.F24", "JORN.S25", "SRER.F24",
                               "SRER.S25", "MOAB.F24", "MOAB.S25",
                               "ONAQ.F24", "ONAQ.S25"),
                    labels = c("JORN: Fall 2024", "JORN: Spring 2025", "SRER: Fall 2024",
                               "SRER: Spring 2025", "MOAB: Fall 2024", "MOAB: Spring 2025",
                               "ONAQ: Fall 2024", "ONAQ: Spring 2025")) +
  ggpmisc::stat_poly_eq(
  aes(color = Group, group = Group,
      label = paste(after_stat(eq.label), after_stat(rr.label), after_stat(p.value.label), sep = "*\", \"*")),
  formula = y ~ x,
  parse = TRUE,
  size = 5,                # font size
  fontface = "bold"        # <-- makes text bold
) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(x = "Elevation (m)", y = "Mean Litter Depth (mm)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color="black", size=16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color="black", size=16),
    legend.title = element_text(color="black", size=16),
    legend.text = element_text(color="black", size=16),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_text(color="black", size=20),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color="black", size=20, angle=90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75))

elev_depth

ggsave("~/Desktop/Litter_Elevation_Regression_NEW.pdf", elev_depth, width = 14, height = 8)

```

```{r}

quad_mass <- read.csv("~/Desktop/Litter_Quadrat_Data_30Oct2025.csv")

quad <- quad_mass %>%
  filter(!Litter_type %in% c("Invertebrates", "Biocrust", "Moss", "Dung"))

QuadStats <- quad %>%
  group_by(Bag_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(total_mass = sum(Litter_mass_g),
                   mass_area = total_mass*10)

BagIDs <- unique(QuadStats$Bag_ID)

colnames(QuadStats) <- c("BagID", "total_mass", "mass_area")

quad_samp <- quad_data %>%
  filter(BagID %in% BagIDs)

quad_fig_data <- merge(QuadStats, quad_samp, by.x = "BagID", by.y = "BagID")

quad_fig_data[, 38:42] <- lapply(quad_fig_data[, 38:42], as.numeric)

QuadDepthStats <- quad_fig_data %>%
  mutate(mean_depth = rowMeans(select(., Litter_depth_center, Litter_depth_north,
                                      Litter_depth_east, Litter_depth_south, Litter_depth_west)))

litter_mass_depth_lm <- lm(mean_depth ~ mass_area, data = QuadDepthStats)
summary(litter_mass_depth_lm)

depth_mass <- ggplot(QuadDepthStats, aes(x = mean_depth, y = mass_area)) +
  stat_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, fullrange = FALSE, color = "forestgreen",
              fill = "forestgreen") +
  geom_point(pch = 21, size = 5, color = "black", fill = "forestgreen") +
  ggpmisc::stat_poly_eq(
  aes(label = paste(after_stat(eq.label), after_stat(rr.label), after_stat(p.value.label), sep = "*\", \"*")),
  formula = y ~ x,
  parse = TRUE,
  size = 7,                # font size
  fontface = "bold"        # <-- makes text bold
) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
   guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 21, color = "black"))) +
 labs(x = "Mean Litter Depth (mm)",
     y = expression("Nonwoody Litter Mass (mg litter / cm"^2*")")) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color="black", size=16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color="black", size=16),
    legend.title = element_text(color="black", size=16),
    legend.text = element_text(color="black", size=16),
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.title.x = element_text(color="black", size=20),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color="black", size=20, angle=90),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # switch off major grid lines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # switch off minor grid lines
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.75))

depth_mass

ggsave("~/Desktop/Litter_Mass_Depth_Regression.pdf", depth_mass, width = 14, height = 6)

```
